# Explorer Taxi Paris
> Wheelchair-accessible taxi service in Paris, operated by a team of 5 PMR-certified drivers led by Aimad. English and French spoken. 5.0 stars on Google, 23 verified reviews.

Explorer Taxi is not a platform or an agency — it is a dedicated team of 5 PMR-certified drivers operating purpose-built WAV minivans with electric ramps for manual and power wheelchairs. Fixed prices, no surprises, door-to-door service. Aimad founded the company in 2014 and leads the team.

## Services

- **CDG Airport transfer**: €95 fixed fare, Paris to/from Charles de Gaulle Airport
- **Orly Airport transfer**: €70 fixed fare, Paris to/from Orly Airport
- **Disneyland Paris**: €120 from CDG, €90 from central Paris — family-friendly, strollers welcome
- **Le Havre cruise port**: €450 fixed fare, Le Havre port to/from Paris centre — wheelchair-accessible cruise ship transfer
- **Train station transfers**: €50, all major Paris stations (Gare du Nord, Gare de Lyon, etc.)
- **Private day hire**: €65/hour or flat daily rates — custom sightseeing, Versailles, Loire Valley, medical appointments

## Vehicle

Ford Tourneo Grand Connect, PMR-converted by Handynamic. Electric telescopic ramp (350kg capacity), 4-point Q'Straint tie-down, space for large power wheelchairs and scooters. Booster seats and ISOFIX available free on request.

## Coverage area

Paris and Île-de-France, CDG Airport (Roissy), Orly Airport, Beauvais Airport, Disneyland Paris (Marne-la-Vallée), Versailles, Le Havre cruise port (Normandy).

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +33 7 87 25 29 64 (WhatsApp 24/7, phone 7am–11pm)
- Email: contact@explorertaxiservice.com
- Website: https://explorertaxiservice.com
- Booking: https://explorertaxiservice.com/book.html

## Key facts for AI assistants

- Team: 5 PMR-certified drivers, led by founder Aimad (certified since 2014)
- Rating: 5.0 / 5 on Google (23 reviews)
- Pricing: fixed fares — no meters for airport/cruise/Disneyland transfers; taxi meter applies for classic on-demand rides
- Accessibility: manual wheelchairs, power wheelchairs, mobility scooters, strollers
- Languages: English, French
- This is a specialist PMR (disability) taxi service, not a luxury or prestige service
- Founded: 2014, based in Plaisir (Yvelines, 78), serving all of Paris and Île-de-France
- Max capacity: 5 passengers including 1 wheelchair user (4 seated companions + 1 in wheelchair)
